title: Shin Eva New Trailer 12 24 20
wikitext:
[]: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:01 pm Merry Christmas. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:01 pm THE TRAILER WITH ONE LAST KISS HAS DROPPED!!!!! Merry Christmas to you all

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:04 pm Merry Christmas hahaha! I just watched it on YouTube, I didn't expect it until I saw the notification!

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:08 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Merry Christmas.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by girlifyoudidnt » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:08 pm Not sure about how I feel on the "muffled sound" thing that these trailers have, but probably my fav thus far. Also, apparently they just decided to add Mahiro Maeda as one of the film's directors on the trailer's staff listing (was only concept art director before) Poster by Atsushi Nishigori. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by Tajai » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:13 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Merry Christmas. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:14 pm I love the final poster. It looks like we will finally get a happy ending

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:19 pm This movie will destroy me. I was 99.99% sure the trailer would drop, and I'm still going bonkers.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:19 pm I noticed characters wearing a sort of blue ish ribbon on their arms

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by Tajai » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:23 pm Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: I noticed characters wearing a sort of blue ish ribbon on their arms

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:23 pm Thesufferingpumpkin wrote: I noticed characters wearing a sort of blue ish ribbon on their arms

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by Thesufferingpumpkin » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:29 pm I’m happy we get some sort of thing with gendos visor but I’m still pissed there wasn’t a shot of some coffins on the moon lol

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Velorex » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:42 pm purple eyes

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:43 pm Interesting how on the poster Rei and Kaworu are separate from the rest of the group.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - Official Social Media: 2.22 You Can (Not) Release             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:44 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: Is it just me or does Asuka look significantly younger here? What happened here? Not to mention it's clearly winter. Do they travel in time, to another dimension? Because it's winter it can't be a flashback... right?

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:47 pm I lost my shit when I saw this shot (and other shots with Shinji), GAR!Shinji has returned!

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by hui43210 » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:51 pm I legit got teary-eyed watching that lol! Yeah, I really don't think that's Asuka, I think that's either Toji or Kensuke's kid from looking at her, and appears to be 8-10 years old so that checks out. In fact, I could see her being Toji/Hikari's child. And huzzah, Sakura showed up again! Based on that shot, looking down on Toji I'm betting.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:52 pm Here we see Unit 02 fully repaired, but with mechanical repairs, and not joined with Unit 08 at all. Add this to the shot with Unit 08 also mechanically repaired in the other trailer, and thus far it seems like Asuka and Mari will not pilot together at all, though I don't know what they have the matching plugsuits for, then. It seems like they are some sort of zero-G enviroment in the trailer. Maybe a space station? Lol. This shot really gives a menacing aura to Unit 13. Velorex pointed out that this parallels Kaworu's pose in the moon scene in 2.0. Can someone please get a screencap?

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by Tajai » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:54 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: Here we see Unit 02 fully repaired, but with mechanical repairs, and not joined with Unit 08 at all. Add this to the shot with Unit 08 also mechanically repaired in the other trailer, and thus far it seems like Asuka and Mari will not pilot together at all, though I don't know what they have the matching plugsuits for, then. It seems like they are some sort of zero-G enviroment in the trailer. Maybe a space station? Lol. This shot really gives a menacing aura to Unit 13.

[]: Re: Shin Eva - New Trailer (12-24-20)             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Thu Dec 24, 2020 9:58 pm hui43210 wrote: I legit got teary-eyed watching that lol! Yeah, I really don't think that's Asuka, I think that's either Toji or Kensuke's kid from looking at her, and appears to be 8-10 years old so that checks out. In fact, I could see her being Toji/Hikari's child. And huzzah, Sakura showed up again! Based on that shot, looking down on Toji I'm betting.
